markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Sean Keys records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Toronto vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 9:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Sean Keys is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Sean Keys starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Sean Keys is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Sean Keys is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Sean Keys: 4+ hits + runs + RBIs?
